policy.notes: SAP MCP servers are executable dependencies. Use exact npm pins or documented source commits; no @latest or bare npx package specs. Observed latest versions are freshness evidence only; do not update approvedVersion without compatibility review.

@cap-js/mcp-server.approvalReason: Current approved exact pin remains aligned with public latest.
@cap-js/mcp-server.trust: CAP model and documentation access; no tenant credentials in the bundled config.
@cap-js/mcp-server.scan: npm view @cap-js/mcp-server@0.0.5 version dist.integrity && npm audit --package-lock-only

@mariodefe/sap-datasphere-mcp.approvalReason: Upgrade candidate only; tenant-safe masking and tool compatibility must be reviewed before pin changes.
@mariodefe/sap-datasphere-mcp.trust: Datasphere tenant access through OAuth environment variables; update only after explicit review.
@mariodefe/sap-datasphere-mcp.scan: npm view @mariodefe/sap-datasphere-mcp@1.2.1 version dist.integrity && npm audit --package-lock-only

@sap-ux/fiori-mcp-server.approvalReason: Current approved exact pin remains aligned with public latest.
@sap-ux/fiori-mcp-server.trust: Newest exact pin approved by maintainer request on 2026-06-14 despite the SAP 14-day cooldown default.
@sap-ux/fiori-mcp-server.scan: npm view @sap-ux/fiori-mcp-server@1.4.0 version dist.integrity && npm audit --package-lock-only

@ui5/mcp-server.approvalReason: Upgrade candidate only; tool-name and lint/scaffold compatibility must be reviewed before pin changes.
@ui5/mcp-server.trust: UI5 documentation, scaffolding, and lint tooling; no tenant credentials in the bundled config.
@ui5/mcp-server.scan: npm view @ui5/mcp-server@0.2.11 version dist.integrity && npm audit --package-lock-only

hana-mcp-server.approvalReason: Current approved exact pin remains aligned with public latest.
hana-mcp-server.trust: HANA database access through environment variables; update only after explicit review.
hana-mcp-server.scan: npm view hana-mcp-server@0.3.1 version dist.integrity && npm audit --package-lock-only

plugins/sap-bw-query/.mcp.json:bw-automa.source: Repository-local source with exact npm lock and a signed portable runtime bundle.
plugins/sap-bw-query/.mcp.json:bw-automa.approvalReason: Windows-only source bootstrap is restricted to the exact password-free PowerShell launcher and bundled Node runtime.
plugins/sap-bw-query/.mcp.json:bw-automa.trust: No credential inputs. Existing BW queries are read-only; the only tenant mutation is preparation for an Eclipse-only human-confirmed new-query save.
plugins/sap-bw-query/.mcp.json:bw-automa.scan: npm --prefix plugins/sap-bw-query/mcp ci --ignore-scripts && npm --prefix plugins/sap-bw-query/mcp audit && npm --prefix plugins/sap-bw-query/mcp run build

plugins/sap-sac-scripting/.mcp.json:sac-.source: Pinned source install; verify with git rev-parse before runtime use.
plugins/sap-sac-scripting/.mcp.json:sac-.approvalReason: Source MCP remains pinned by commit and path token; update only after source review.
plugins/sap-sac-scripting/.mcp.json:sac-.trust: Trusted secondsky fork source install. This MCP uses SAC OAuth credentials and exposes read/write SAC REST API tools.
plugins/sap-sac-scripting/.mcp.json:sac-.scan: git -C "$SAC_MCP_PATH" rev-parse HEAD && npm --prefix "$SAC_MCP_PATH" ci --ignore-scripts && npm --prefix "$SAC_MCP_PATH" audit
